calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Allowance Of Remainder Of Fee And Extraordinary Fees Related To Executors Refusal To Comply With Court Order And Removal Of Executor
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alma Beck in her own behalf. Don Whitney in Pro Per.

The Court directed Ms. Beck to place a stop payment on the $1,000.00 retainer check and that no more fees would be paid. Her petition was denied. Mr. Whitney was informed that his accounting petition did not state the actual amount of cash on hand, that he would have to file a supplemental declaration stating the exact amount and to submit a revised order. The accounting petition was continued to December 3, 2007.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Mizota.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Continued To Dec-03-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-23-2007 Continued To Nov-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Alma Beck appeared as respondent. Don Whitney (Executor) appeared in Pro Per.

The Court stated that no ruling could be made until the pending motion scheduled for November 19, 2007 was heard. Ms. Beck represented that the $1,000.00 retainer was not related to this matter and that Mr. Whitney slould pay the entire amount. The Court informed Mr. Whitney about the issues raised by the examiner (no proposed order was submitted, graduated filing fees, taxes). Mr. Whitney stated that he did not receive any notices from the Examiner. The Court continued the matter to November 19, 2007. Mr. Whitney is to file a supplemental declaration addressing the Examiners issues.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Reporter: Trina Ayala CSR#12964. Bailiff: Rob Harris. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Notice Of Motion; Executor'S Motion To Stay Proceedings, Strike Perition, Strip Of Status Deny Remedy & Order Beck To Submit.
Off Calendar Sep-27-2007 Off Calendar

Petition For Allowance On Account Of Attorney'S Compensarion For Ordinary And Extraordinary Legal Services.
Off Calendar Aug-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Alma Soongi Beck, appearing for petitioner, Amir Atashi Rang, Don Whitney objector
Counsel stated that fees were separated in two catogories. The first were the fees for the services performed to determined if the was a need for a probate. Once that was established a statutory fees schedule was establised. Counsel states that she also was willing to reduce the fees, prior to the dispute. Mr. Whitney stated that there was not enough work preformed for the amount of fees billed and disagrees with counsel. He states that there is also double billings. The matter was taken under submission.
COMMISSIONER:DOROTHY MCMATH, REPORTER: KATY BESAMIN, CSR# 11722, CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON, BALIFF:F.SMITH

Petition For Allowance On Account Of Attorney'S Compensarion For Ordinary And Extraordinary Legal Services.
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Continued To Jul-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Alma Soongi Beck appearing as petitioner. Don Whitney appearing as executor. Mr. Whitney wanted to request for continuance on Ms. Beck's petition. He has filed a Motion to strike and to go to arbitration for fee dispute. It is set for hearing in September. He argued that they have a fee contract and he has paid her for services. Ms. Beck responded that the fee contract was before probate. Court instructed Mr. Whitney to file written opposition ans serve Ms. Beck by 7/23. Matter is continued to 7/30. Court will determine if the hearing on Mr. Whitney's motion set in September is moot during the next hearing.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Drocco.
